# Quill 1.3.7 (self-hosted)

Bundled for the **marketing landing** contact modal so the editor loads **same-origin** (avoids browser tracking prevention blocking storage for `cdn.jsdelivr.net`).

To upgrade, replace `quill.min.js` and `quill.snow.css` from the matching npm package `quill@x.y.z` `dist/` folder.
